name: THE FROST – ColdPlasma by Skinlab
shortDescription: THE FROST is a modern, professional electro-cosmetic device that combines cold plasma, warm plasma and ozone plasma technology in a single unit. Its goal is to visibly improve skin condition without incisions, bleeding or long recovery times, designed exclusively for cosmetic and aesthetic use.
description:
THE FROST – ColdPlasma by Skinlab is a modern, professional electro-cosmetic device that combines cold plasma, warm plasma and ozone plasma technology in a single unit.

Its goal is to visibly improve skin condition without incisions, bleeding or long recovery times, designed exclusively for cosmetic and aesthetic use.

The device is not a medical device; it is used in a cosmetic environment. It falls entirely within the competence of beauticians, and complete legal documentation is included with every unit.
metaTitle: THE FROST ColdPlasma | 9-in-1 Professional Cold Plasma Device | Skinlab Hungary
metaDescription: THE FROST cold plasma device: 9 functions in one unit. Cold plasma, thermoplasma, ozone plasma. Acne, anti-aging, skin rejuvenation. 2-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: Why now is the right time to think about cold plasma
paragraphs: Cold plasma technology has been a staple of premium salons in Western Europe for years. However, the market is not yet saturated in Hungary, so salons introducing it now can gain a real professional and business advantage.
Today's clients learn from social media (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube), watch foreign treatments and before-after videos, and actively search for 'plasma facial' and 'cold plasma' treatments.
With THE FROST, you can be among the first to offer this technology – at premium prices, with a premium experience.

features.title: What is THE FROST cold plasma device used for?
features.description:
The device supports the skin's natural regeneration processes while disinfecting, activating and deeply stimulating.

Key effects:

Improvement of problematic, acne-prone skin
Antibacterial, anti-inflammatory effect
Reduction of fine lines and skin irregularities
Skin firming, collagen stimulation
Skin rejuvenation, brighter complexion
Multiple increase in active ingredient absorption
Scalp activation, hair follicle stimulation

features.title: Cold plasma treatments
features.description:
Gentle, painless technology, ideal even for sensitive skin.
Derma Plasma – skin rejuvenation, pore cleansing
Stamp Plasma – microstimulation, skin texture improvement
Hyper Plasma – intensive antibacterial effect
Scalp Plasma – scalp activation, for hair care treatments
Jet Plasma – active ingredient delivery, refreshing treatment
no burning sensationno recovery timeimmediate skin comfort

features.title: Thermoplasma treatments – targeted anti-aging focus
features.description:
Deeper-acting technology that stimulates the deeper layers of the skin. Even fewer treatments deliver visible results with long-term firming.
Warm Plasma – skin firming, collagen stimulation
Flash Plasma – intensive skin activation
Diamond Plasma – skin surface refinement, lifting effect
deeper layer stimulationvisible resultslonger-lasting firming effect

features.title: Ozone plasma – nature's powerful antibacterial solution
features.description:
Ozone plasma is one of the most powerful natural disinfection solutions. After treatment, ozone converts to oxygen, leaving no harmful residue behind.
Destruction of acne bacteria
Anti-inflammatory effect
Reduction of sebum production
Chemical-free skin disinfection

training.headline: Device operator training – official adult education programme
training.intro: Professional device operator training is available for THE FROST, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education. The training aims to give participants comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge for the safe and professional use of the device.
items: Operating principles of cold plasma, thermoplasma and ozone plasma technology
Precise application areas and settings for all 9 functions
Treatment protocols for different skin types and concerns
Acne treatment protocol with ozone plasma
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can master treatment techniques in a real-world, safe and supervised educational environment.
Upon completion, we issue an official certificate confirming competence in the professional use of THE FROST device.
If the training opportunity interests you, please contact us via one of our channels to arrange an appointment!

testimonials.name: Vivien Szabó
testimonials.text: I had been looking for a device that would allow me to <mark>truly offer premium facial treatments to my clients</mark>. THE FROST delivers exactly that! Clients love that there's no pain, no recovery time, yet the results are impressive. The ozone plasma is particularly effective for acne-prone skin.

testimonials.name: Petra Molnár
testimonials.text: Cold plasma technology was what helped my salon <mark>stand out from the competition</mark>. It's still available in very few places, and clients specifically seek it out. The 9 functions fully cover facial treatment needs, and the training was very thorough.

expertQuote.quote: Cold plasma is one of the most dynamically developing areas in the cosmetics industry. Those who introduce it now gain a real competitive advantage – both the technology's effectiveness and market demand support this.
expertQuote.author: László Horváth

faq.question: What is the difference between cold plasma and a traditional plasma pen?
faq.answer: A traditional plasma pen (fibroblast) creates burn points on the skin, which is painful and involves significant recovery time. THE FROST's cold plasma technology, by contrast, is non-invasive, painless, and requires no recovery time – the client can continue their day immediately after treatment.

faq.question: Can I legally use the device as a beautician?
faq.answer: Yes! THE FROST is officially classified within beautician competence. Complete legal documentation is provided with every device purchased from us, allowing you to use it lawfully and safely in your salon.

faq.question: What skin problems is THE FROST suitable for?
faq.answer: It is widely applicable: acne and problematic skin, fine lines, skin irregularities, skin laxity, dull complexion, scalp issues. Ozone plasma is particularly effective for inflammatory skin conditions, while thermoplasma is ideal primarily for anti-aging purposes.

faq.question: Is the treatment painful?
faq.answer: Cold plasma treatments are completely painless, and work excellently even on sensitive skin. Thermoplasma treatments may cause a mild warm sensation, but it is not uncomfortable. Neither treatment type requires anaesthesia.

faq.question: How quickly does THE FROST pay for itself?
faq.answer: Cold plasma treatment prices typically range from 15,000 to 35,000 Ft. With 3-5 clients per day, the device generally pays for itself within 2-4 months. Use our ROI calculator on the page for precise calculations!

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: A one-day intensive operator training within the framework of officially registered adult education, free with device purchase. The training covers all 9 functions, treatment protocols, and includes practical treatments. An official certificate is issued upon completion.

faq.question: Is there recovery time after treatment?
faq.answer: After cold plasma treatments, there is no recovery time – the client can leave immediately. After thermoplasma treatments, minimal, temporary redness may occur, which typically fades within 1-2 hours.

faq.question: What consumables or supplementary materials are needed?
faq.answer: One of the great advantages of plasma technology is that no separate consumables are needed for treatments. The treatment heads are durable and reusable. For active ingredient delivery (Jet Plasma), the desired serum is naturally required.
